summary.notes: Kimi K3 open model release is the standout headline. GPT-5.6 setup guide and OpenAI self-red-teaming also relevant. Ben's Bites and Latent Space podcast have low signal-to-noise from URL-only triage.

items.title: [AINews] Kimi K3 2.8T-A50B: the largest open model ever released; Opus 4.8-class at Sonnet 5 pricing
items.reason: Major open-source model release. Kimi K3 (Moonshot AI) at 2.8T total / 50B active params claims Opus 4.8-class performance at Sonnet 5 pricing — largest open model ever. Directly impacts open-source AI ecosystem, model comparison pages, and LLM pricing tracker.
target_pages: entities/moonshot-ai (new or update — company behind Kimi)

items.title: GPT-5.6.
items.reason: GPT-5.6 setup guide. Wiki already tracks GPT-5.6 (events/2026-06-27-openai-gpt-5-6-sol.md). New setup/practical guide content could enrich existing pages or serve as a raw source reference.

items.title: 🔴 OpenAI Built an AI to Attack Itself

items.notes: All URLs are beehiiv tracking redirects — actual article URLs need to be resolved during wiki-ingest by following redirects.

items.title: I've got an Inkling
items.reason: Ben's Bites AI newsletter digest. Subject 'I've got an Inkling' — unclear what specific AI topic is covered. All links are truncated Substack redirects with no descriptive titles. Ben's Bites is AI-focused but cannot determine specific content relevance without URL resolution.
items.notes: Low signal from URLs alone. The Substack redirect links (link IDs like e498417f, ba107814, etc.) contain the actual article targets but are truncated. Consider resolving during wiki-ingest if capacity allows.

items.title: 🔬 The Lab of the Future Should Feel Like a Data Center — Andy Beam & Rafa Gómez-Bombarelli, Lila Sciences
items.reason: Latent Space podcast episode about AI-driven science labs and Lila Sciences. Topic is AI4Science / lab automation — tangentially related to AI agents but not core LLM/Agent wiki scope. All 20 links point to the same podcast post with different UI element anchors (play_card, progress_bar, etc.). No new external article links.
items.notes: All 20 links are internal podcast player UI elements for the same episode. No extractable external articles. Skip unless AI4Science becomes a wiki focus area.
